taxonomy: Euosma campanulata is a species of moth in the family Tortricidae. It is classified within the subfamily Olethreutinae and the tribe Eriocraniinae. The genus Euosma is a part of the family Tortricidae. The classification of Euosma campanulata is based on its morphological characteristics and molecular analysis. Further studies are required to confirm its precise classification within the family Tortricidae.
